generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and preparedness, you know how important it is to have a strong civil defense system. Recent studies show that communities with well-funded civil defense programs experience significantly lower crime rates and faster recovery from disasters. Isn't it time we prioritize our safety and invest in these vital programs? #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
